heading: Interface Endpoints
body:
To delete the Google Cloud private endpoint interface you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints gcp interfaces delete <id> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas privateEndpoints gcp interfaces delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-gcp-interfaces-delete).

Atlas UI

- Click the Private Endpoint tab.

- Next to the private endpoint you want to remove, click
  Terminate.

- To confirm, click Confirm in the dialog box.
